name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.10.1 collapsible panel host and restorable panel collapsed state
added: Reusable collapsible panel host helpers for selected WinForms split panels
Layout state support for panel collapsed state and last splitter distance
Appearance tab controls for collapsing, restoring, and restoring all layout panels
Non-modal close-time layout persistence to avoid PipelineStoppedException/JIT dialogs
Restored nested scripts/windows/run-quality-checks.bat quality gate launcher
next_recommended: v3.10.2: stackable workspace groups for history, recovery, integrate, metrics, and output panels
v3.10.3: explicit layout save/discard/reset polish and profile selection
v3.10.4: dockable layout simulation with saved workspace profiles
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Makes the v3.10.0 layout model visible through practical collapsible panel controls
Keeps collapse/restore reversible and confirmation-free because no Git state is modified
Stores collapsed state in the same UI-independent layout model used for splitter distances
Avoids close-time modal prompts so the WinForms/PowerShell shutdown path remains safe
iteration_highlights: Extended tests/GitLayoutState.Tests.ps1 with collapsible panel behavior coverage
Added Appearance tab Collapsible Panel Host controls
Updated static smoke checks for collapsible panel host markers
Added v3.10.1 layout documentation and release notes
